summary: Tested light mode conversion, all editable content sections, admin panel tabs, and backend API endpoints. Everything working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Light mode (#F5F0E8 bg) confirmed. All 4 new content API endpoints (projects, gallery, feedback, footer) return correct default values. Admin panel has all 9 tabs (Hero, About, Projects, Gallery, Resume, Contact, Wheel, Reviews, Footer). Hero tab: NAME, TITLE LABEL, SUBTITLE, MARQUEE TEXT, PRIMARY CTA, SECONDARY CTA, BADGE TEXT, PROFILE IMAGE. About tab: HEADING, HEADING ACCENT, BIO, YEARS OF EXPERIENCE, PROJECTS COUNT, TOOLS, SKILLS, EXPERIENCE. Footer tab: TAGLINE, COPYRIGHT TEXT. All save buttons work. Homepage renders hero section with all fields from API.
verified_items: GET /api/content/footer: {tagline:'Motion Graphic Designer', copyright:'Made with love by Rohith Puli'}
GET /api/content/hero: all fields including cta_primary, cta_secondary, badge_text, marquee_text
Hero section renders: ROHITH PULI name, MOTION GRAPHIC DESIGNER title, subtitle, VIEW WORK + GET IN TOUCH CTAs, AVAILABLE FOR HIRE badge
Footer renders tagline and copyright from API
Admin panel Hero tab: all 8 fields present
Admin panel About tab: all 8 fields present
Admin panel Footer tab: TAGLINE + COPYRIGHT TEXT fields
Admin save buttons work (footer saved! success message confirmed)
All 9 admin tabs present: Hero, About, Projects, Gallery, Resume, Contact, Wheel, Reviews, Footer
